ensures.text: forall k: int {:trigger orig[k]} | 0 <= k < |orig| :: orig[k] <= bound
forall k: int {:trigger orig[k]} | 0 <= k < |orig| :: orig[k] <= bound

requires.text: forall k: int {:trigger sorted[k]} | 0 <= k < |sorted| :: sorted[k] <= bound
forall k: int {:trigger sorted[k]} | 0 <= k < |sorted| :: sorted[k] <= bound

invariants.text: forall p: int {:trigger sortedA[p]} | 0 <= p < i :: forall q: int {:trigger sortedA[q]} | p < q < |sortedA| :: sortedA[p] <= sortedA[q]
forall p: int {:trigger sortedA[p]} | 0 <= p < i :: forall q: int {:trigger sortedA[q]} | p < q < |sortedA| :: sortedA[p] <= sortedA[q]
forall k: int {:trigger sortedA[k]} | i < k < j :: sortedA[i] <= sortedA[k]
forall p: int {:trigger sortedB[p]} | 0 <= p < i :: forall q: int {:trigger sortedB[q]} | p < q < |sortedB| :: sortedB[p] <= sortedB[q]
forall p: int {:trigger sortedB[p]} | 0 <= p < i :: forall q: int {:trigger sortedB[q]} | p < q < |sortedB| :: sortedB[p] <= sortedB[q]
forall k: int {:trigger sortedB[k]} | i < k < j :: sortedB[i] <= sortedB[k]

assertions.text: forall k: int {:trigger sortedA[k]} | 0 <= k < |sortedA| :: sortedA[k] <= a
forall k: int {:trigger sortedB[k]} | 0 <= k < |sortedB| :: sortedB[k] <= b
forall k: int {:trigger A[k]} | 0 <= k < |A| :: A[k] < a + b
forall k: int {:trigger B[k]} | 0 <= k < |B| :: B[k] < a + b

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger A[i]} | 0 <= i < |A| :: A[i] > 0
forall i: int {:trigger B[i]} | 0 <= i < |B| :: B[i] > 0
forall i: int {:trigger A[i]} | 0 <= i < |A| :: A[i] > 0
forall i: int {:trigger B[i]} | 0 <= i < |B| :: B[i] > 0
